channel.title: Iterators on Michael-F-Bryan
channel.description: Recent content in Iterators on Michael-F-Bryan

item.title: Daily Rust: Iterators
item.description: Iterators are part of Rust’s secret sauce. They power things from the humble for-loop to the elegant iterator chain, but have you ever stopped to think how they work? Let’s find out more about Rust’s iterators by implementing our own versions of common iterators and reading the standard library’s source code. The code written in this article is available on the Rust Playground using the various (playground) links dotted throughout. Feel free to browse through and steal code or inspiration.
